notes: Wave 1 of OPPORTUNITY-SURFACE-SPEC, by owner direction: the infrastructure that computes the market heat map's cells — the % gap between each security's price and its precision-weighted model-of-models value — across the full NYSE + NASDAQ common-stock universe. - The universe (surface_refresh_universe): every actively-trading common stock on both exchanges with sector/industry/mcap metadata; ETFs, funds, and inactive listings excluded WITH COUNTS, never silently. - Two cadences, deliberately. Model values move on filings — quarterly forces — so the MODEL REFRESH is a rolling, RESUMABLE batch
